bead.title: runtime fallback removal + audit-side migration
bead.description:
Bead 3 of 4 children under epic ddx-3562c48c. Depends on bead 2 (ddx-908a6d5d). May run in parallel with bead 4.

Strip remaining ~/.ddx/plugins runtime reads; thread Force through update; audit-side path resolution.

PERSONA FALLBACK:
- DELETE cli/internal/persona/loader.go:64 fallback to ~/.ddx/plugins/ddx/personas.
- Missing-config error message: 'DDx config not found; run "ddx init" to bootstrap project'.

AUDIT (cli/internal/registry/audit.go):
- Lines 104, 336, 339: stop ExpandHome on entry.Files. Resolve paths relative to projectRoot.
- Pre-migration entries with ~/... paths uninstall as no-ops (existing os.Remove on missing path is tolerated).
- Covered by TestUninstall_StaleHomeEntriesAreNoOp.

GRAPHQL:
- DELETE cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008.go:746-759 (pluginRootCandidates). Resolver returns project-rooted paths only.
- Update affected resolver tests.

UPDATE COMMAND:
- cli/cmd/update.go: plumb skills.Options{Force: true} into skills.Install for the --force path.
- TestUpdate_ForceReplacesStaleSymlinks: project starts with symlinks under .agents/skills/ pointing to ~/.ddx/plugins/, ddx update --force replaces with real files.

WORKTREE FALLBACK (gated decision):
- NEW TestExecuteBead_WorktreeFromPreMigrationCommit: create worktree from a commit predating migration; run skill-resolution path.
- IF the test passes WITHOUT cli/internal/agent/worktree_skills.go:106-114 resolveBrokenSkillLink, DELETE the fallback in this bead.
- IF the test fails, KEEP the fallback as a no-op for new installs and add a code comment + doc note.

DOCTOR:
- cli/cmd/doctor.go: when symlinks exist under <projectRoot>/.agents/skills/ or .claude/skills/, doctor exits non-zero. stderr contains 'symlink detected under .agents/skills/' (and same for .claude/skills/). Recommendation message ends with 'run: ddx update --force'.
- TestDoctor_FlagsLegacySymlinks asserts exit code and stderr substrings.

OUT OF SCOPE: .gitignore, docs (bead 4). State.json relocation (separate follow-up).
bead.acceptance: 1. cli/internal/persona/loader.go:64 fallback removed; missing-config error message points at ddx init. 2. cli/internal/registry/audit.go:104,336,339 no longer ExpandHome; paths resolve relative to projectRoot. 3. TestUninstall_StaleHomeEntriesAreNoOp passes. 4. cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008.go:746-759 pluginRootCandidates removed; affected resolver tests updated and passing. 5. cli/cmd/update.go threads Options{Force: true} for --force path. TestUpdate_ForceReplacesStaleSymlinks passes. 6. TestExecuteBead_WorktreeFromPreMigrationCommit exists and passes. resolveBrokenSkillLink removed if test passes without it; otherwise kept with comment. Decision documented in commit message. 7. Doctor exits non-zero with the specified stderr substrings when legacy symlinks present. TestDoctor_FlagsLegacySymlinks passes. 8. cd cli && go build ./... && go test ./... passes.
